subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant and a champion in the field! Numerous letters from thee were received and their contents were noted... Among them were the tidings concerning the blessed Manifestation in the Book of Daniel [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان و مرد میدان مکاتیب متعدده آنجناب واصل و بر کیفیت اطلاع حاصل... از جمله اخبارات بظهور مبارک در کتاب دانیال
subcodes.subjects: @Adam; Adam and Eve, @interpretation of words and passages in scripture, @reincarnation, @predictions and prophecies, @prophecy and fulfillment, @prayer for strength
